description_long: This is a single-serve yogurt or dessert cup with a tapered cylindrical shape, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The packaging is predominantly red and white, featuring a stylized illustration of a woman's face in black and white, with a wide-brimmed hat, and large, vibrant strawberries as the main graphic element. The lid is foil-sealed and displays the product name 'BOHUNKA' along with additional branding and a large, realistic strawberry image. The sides of the cup are covered with product information, including ingredients and branding, in white text on a red background. The overall appearance is glossy, with a smooth plastic surface and a metallic foil lid. The cup is lightweight and designed for easy handling, typical for dairy snack products found in urban convenience stores.
description: A red and white plastic yogurt or dessert cup with a foil lid, featuring strawberry graphics and a stylized woman's face illustration. The packaging is glossy, smooth, and covered with branding and product information.
description_view_0: Front view shows the product name 'BOHUNKA', a large strawberry graphic, and the stylized woman's face, with the foil lid prominently displayed.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the ingredients and nutritional information in white text on a red background, with part of the strawberry graphic visible.
description_view_2: Another side view focuses on the continuation of the product information and branding, with the woman's face and strawberry graphic partially visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the back side with more branding, a barcode, and the foil lid's edge, along with the strawberry graphic wrapping around.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white rectangular logo with the text 'BOHUNKA' is visible on the lid and side, accompanied by a stylized woman's face illustration.
attribute_flavor_indication: Large, realistic strawberry graphics and red color cues indicate a strawberry flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the side of the cup in white text on a red background.
